home.headline: Your daily commute, reinvented.
home.subheadline: Share weekly rides across Cairo. One agreement, one price, zero daily hassle.
home.driver_card_desc: Drive weekly routes and earn predictable income on your schedule.
home.passenger_card_desc: Book pooled rides and save on your daily commute every week.
